summary: REQ-2 is fully implemented: Hero.tsx now references the new image as a full-screen background with a semi-transparent overlay and all existing hero content is preserved. REQ-1 (generating and saving the actual image file) is not evidenced in the diff — no new image file appears in the added files list, and project_state.json still marks the related action as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a new AI illustration hero image and save it as 'hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated/.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added image file. The 'ADDED FILES' section is empty ('none'), and project_state.json lists AR-1 (mapped to REQ-1) with status 'pending'. The Hero.tsx references the image by path but the actual PNG asset is absent from the diff.
